name: BLACK HOLE DSP 2
subtitle: 16-Program Stereo Effects Processor
summary: Stereo multi-effects processor built around the Spin Semiconductor FV-1 DSP. Sixteen factory programs span reverbs, delays, chorus, flanger, and pitch effects; sixteen user slots accept custom FV-1 programs uploaded via the PROG jack. Three parameter knobs (P1–P3) are all CV-controllable.
